introSection: Avatar Airbender is an Intamin Halfpipe Coaster at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train that seats 12 people. Riders are arranged in two 6-person circles that are positioned at each side of the surfboard themed train.

fullText:
Avatar Airbender is an Intamin Halfpipe Coaster at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, USA.



Single train that seats 12 people. Riders are arranged in two 6-person circles that are positioned at each side of the surfboard themed train.
